Petitioner David R. Gilliam'S Hearing On Petition For Writ
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Continued To Apr-25-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joel Douglas, Esq. of Bonne Bridges, et al, 213-480-1900 for petitioner and moving party David Gilliam. Lawrence Rose, Esq. of Epstein Becker & Green, 415-398-3500 and Charles Sweeris, Esq., Deputy General Counsel, 415-229-5107 for defendant and opposing party Blue Shield of California

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court continued Petitioner David R. Gilliam's Petition for Writ to 4/25/05. A Statement of Decision will be filed by 4/25/05. Parties to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR: 1558

Petitioner David R. Gilliam'S Hearing On Petition For Writ
Off Calendar Apr-15-2005 Continued To Apr-19-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joel Bruce Douglas, Esq. of Bonne Bridges, et al, 213-480-1900 for petitioner moving party David Gilliam. Lawrence Rose, Esq. of Epstein Becker & Green, 415-398-3500 for defendant and opposing party Blue Shield of California.

RULING:
As a result of a disclosure that was made in open court by The Honorable Kevin M. McCarthy, the respondent, Blue Shield of Califonia requested a 170.6 challenge. The court granted the 170.6 and continued Petitioner David R. Gilliam's hearing on petition for writ to 4/19/05 to be heard by the Honorable James L. Warren. (301/KMCCA/EH) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR: 6840

Ntc Of Hrg To Set Trial Date & Briefing Schedule On Petition For Writ
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joel Bruce Douglas, Esq., Bonne, Bridges, Mueller, O'Keefe & Nichols, (213) 738-5834, for Petitioner David Gilliam
Lawrence J. Rose, Esq., Epstein, Becker & Green, (415) 398-0955, for Respondent Blue Shield of California
RULING:
Counsel represented to the Court that parties wanted to set a hearing date on Petition for Writ, not a trial date. Court vacated its tentative ruling. Per stipulation of counsel, PETITIONER DAVID GILLIAM's Hearing To Set Hearing Date & Briefing Schedule On Petition For Writ is as follows: Hearing date may be set for 4/15/05; Moving papers are due by 3/25/05; Opposition papers are due by 4/5/05; and Replies are due by 4/11/05. Attorney Douglas is to prepare the stipulation and order. The 4/15/05 hearing shall be noticed separately. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
